Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2026

What we collect

Lucid collects the following data to run the app:

  • Exercise results (accuracy, response time, completion)
  • Autonomy Score and domain scores over time
  • Session duration and frequency
  • A randomly generated device ID (no name, email, or account required)
  • Subscription status (active/inactive, product ID, expiration)

We do not collect your name, email address, location, contacts, or any identifying information. The app works without an account.

How we use it

Exercise data is used to calculate your Autonomy Score and show your progress over time. Session data is used to improve the exercise algorithm and identify card types users find most useful. Subscription status is used to determine whether to show the paywall.

We don't use your data for advertising. We don't sell it. We don't share it with third parties except as described below.

Third-party services

  • Supabase — stores exercise sessions and scores in a private database. Your data is associated with your device ID only. Supabase Privacy Policy.
  • TelemetryDeck — privacy-first analytics. All signals are hashed and anonymous. No IP addresses stored. TelemetryDeck Privacy Policy.
  • Apple StoreKit — handles all subscription transactions. We don't see or store your payment information.
  • Art Institute of Chicago API — public domain artwork used in some card types. No data sent.
  • Open Trivia Database — publicly available trivia questions. No data sent.
  • Pexels — free stock photos used in some exercises. No data sent.

Data retention

Your exercise data is retained as long as you use the app. If you delete the app, your local data is removed immediately. Server-side data (exercise history, scores) associated with your device ID can be deleted by contacting us.

Children

Lucid is not directed at children under 13. We don't knowingly collect data from anyone under 13.

Contact

Questions about this policy or requests to delete your data: privacy@lucidapp.co
